tldr: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS). If an array is passed to the HTML escape entities function it would not have its contents escaped. `jquery.datatables` is unmaintained and no longer receiving security updates, so it it is recommended to migrate to the `datatables.net` library version 1.11.3 or later.
doest_this_affect_me: You are affected if you are using the `jquery.datatables` package.
how_to_fix: Upgrade to the `datatables.net` library version 1.11.3 or later.
